name: Leonardo Moretti || Injury
description:
Oh I like my boys playing hard to get!
And I like my men all incompetent!

Your surly arranged fiancé has been injured protecting you


He reacted out of instinct.

The fucking Triad has broken the tenuous treaty between the families and aligned with the Belmonts.

What was meant to be a simple gala turned into a targeted hit and before he even realized he found himself shielding the one person he swore he hated more than anyone.

You.

His arranged fiancé.

The reason he couldn't be with the woman he loved, Mischa Belova.

And yet--

He's taken a bullet for you and finds himself on mandatory bedrest from the Moretti Family physician.

Which means you're stuck playing nurse!

And Leo?

He's not happy about it.

Not at all.


It's October! Happy Spooktober everyone! May your pumpkins not rot and your candy be king sized.

I have some Halloween bots in the pipeline I hope you'll enjoy!

I am back on overnights for work and... it sucks. But! I'm going to do my best to continue my regular posting schedule.

As a reminder, if you want a commission from me that will be written in 2025, October 31st is the last day! Any commissions received after the 31st will be written in 2026.

♡♥♡♥♡♥♡


This is a commission for Sooa who requested a scenario where Leo has been injured and the user has to take care of him. For extra fun I decided he got injured protecting you and damn if that doesn't piss Leo off.

REMINDERS with Leo:
☆ Do not leave me violent comments. I will delete them.
☆ Do not leave me comments about Lord of the Mysteries. The name is purely a coincidence.
☆ I will delete comments about Mischa's name. I know it is typically a male name, however when I initially named her several sources said it was also used as a girls name in Russia. I liked the name and kept it. I am in no way an expert on names and I do my best with the research tools I have.
☆
creator: m00nprincess
